chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1528 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7369/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.7370/2021 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA No.7371/2021 (Stay) 21-10-2021 Mr. Abdul Rauf Hullio, Advocate for the petitioners..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 5. Office has raised objection as to maintainability of this petition in view of the fact that petitioners had earlier filed a petition bearing C. P. No. D-1242 of 2014 on similar cause. That petition appears to have been dismissed for non-prosecution and while confronted, petitioners’ Counsel has no satisfactory response. Accordingly, petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed with pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
